title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies!
